entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A self-pollinated legume crop providing edible oil and vegetable protein, cultivated between 40ºN to 40ºS of the equator

entities.name: EDIBLE OIL
entities.description: A major component of groundnut kernels, comprising 47-53%

entities.name: VEGETABLE PROTEIN
entities.description: A major component of groundnut kernels, comprising 25-36%

entities.name: UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
entities.description: Region with groundnut productivity of 3500 kg/ha

entities.name: SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: Region with groundnut productivity of 2500 kg/ha

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region with groundnut productivity of 1600 kg/ha

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region with groundnut productivity of less than 800 kg/ha

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living constraints including temperature, drought, and soil factors that affect groundnut productivity

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living constraints including pests, diseases, and weeds that affect groundnut productivity

entities.name: TEMPERATURE EXTREMES
entities.description: An abiotic stress affecting groundnut growth and development

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress and main yield limiting factor in semiarid regions

entities.name: ALKALINITY
entities.description: A soil factor acting as an abiotic stress

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A soil factor acting as an abiotic stress

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: A soil factor acting as an abiotic stress causing yield losses

entities.name: SANDY LOAM SOILS
entities.description: Light textured soils in which groundnuts grow best

entities.name: NEUTRAL PH
entities.description: The preferred soil pH for groundnut growth

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Water requirement for groundnut growth, typically 500-600 mm

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: An essential nutrient for groundnut growth

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: An essential nutrient for groundnut growth

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: An essential nutrient for groundnut growth

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A nutrient whose deficiency causes significant yield losses in groundnut

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A nutrient whose deficiency causes significant yield losses in groundnut

entities.name: BORON
entities.description: A nutrient whose deficiency causes significant yield losses in groundnut

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Biotic stress agents including insects that affect groundnut

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Biotic stress agents affecting groundnut health

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Biotic stress agents that compete with groundnut

entities.name: POD BORERS
entities.description: Important insect pests of groundnut

entities.name: APHIDS
entities.description: Important insect pests of groundnut

entities.name: MITES
entities.description: Important insect pests of groundnut

entities.name: LEAF SPOTS
entities.description: Important diseases affecting groundnut

entities.name: RUSTS
entities.description: Important diseases affecting groundnut

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS
entities.description: A toxin-producing fungus that causes disease in groundnut
